Connection pool size should be proportional to the number of concurrent requests you want to serve (obvious no?) - Activate connection validation » Mind networking tools that might cut connections sitting idle (yes, your server is not always busy), they might cut the connection in “bad” ways (10 minutes timeout before the pool realizes the TCP connection attempt gives up) - Read more at http:/geoserver.geo- [Yo) [V]{{e]a I VA=Ys [V1L=1a k=Yo VAR e EsYexe)a) (o (s oM oYoYe) g Te Mattaall
